sentences.arabic: فِي رَأْيِي، التَّعَلُّمُ لَا يَتَوَقَّفُ عِنْدَ سِنٍّ مُعَيَّنَةٍ.
sentences.translation: Po mom mišljenju, učenje se ne zaustavlja u određenim godinama.
sentences.translationEn: In my opinion, learning does not stop at a certain age.

sentences.arabic: الْكَبِيرُ يَسْتَطِيعُ أَنْ يَتَعَلَّمَ مِثْلَ الصَّغِيرِ.
sentences.translation: Starija osoba može učiti poput mlađe.
sentences.translationEn: An older person can learn just like a younger one.

sentences.arabic: رَأَيْتُ جَدَّتِي تَتَعَلَّمُ الْكِتَابَةَ فِي سِنِّ السِّتِّينَ.
sentences.translation: Vidio sam baku kako uči pisati u šezdesetoj godini.
sentences.translationEn: I saw my grandmother learning to write at the age of sixty.

sentences.arabic: أَلْهَمَتْنِي جِدًّا وَجَعَلَتْنِي أُحِبُّ التَّعَلُّمَ أَكْثَرَ.
sentences.translation: Jako me nadahnula i navela me da više volim učenje.
sentences.translationEn: She inspired me greatly and made me love learning more.
